children.label: a
children.text: Any sale or lease of property, supplies, or services to the Congressional Budget Office shall be deemed to be a sale or lease to the Congress subject to .section 4103 of this title

children.label: b
children.text: Subsection (a) shall apply with respect to fiscal years beginning after .September 30, 1996
